UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user authentication and profile information.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth or Solana Wallet.

email.description: User's email address (if using email login).

walletAddress.description: User's Solana wallet address (if using Web3 login).

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

lastActive.description: When the user was last active.

userAgent.description: User agent of the active session.

ipAddress.description: IP address (if available) of the active session.

AuditRecord.title: Audit Record
AuditRecord.description: Stores the results of a smart contract audit.

userId.description: ID of the user who requested the audit.

codeHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the audited code.

codeSnippet.description: A snippet of the audited code.

cost.description: Cost of the audit in SOL (simulated).

nftMinted.description: Whether an NFT was minted for this audit.
